nodes.docs: Creates a Tempo payment method for usage on the client.
tags:
```ts
import { tempo } from 'mpay/client'
import { privateKeyToAccount } from 'viem/accounts'

const method = tempo({
  account: privateKeyToAccount('0x...'),
  rpcUrl: 'https://rpc.tempo.xyz',
})
```

nodes.text:
(alias) function privateKeyToAccount(privateKey: Hex, options?: PrivateKeyToAccountOptions): PrivateKeyAccount
import privateKeyToAccount
tags: Creates an Account from a private key.

nodes.text: function fetch(input: RequestInfo | URL, init?: RequestInit): Promise<Response> (+1 overload)

nodes.docs: Creates a fetch wrapper that automatically handles 402 Payment Required responses.
Custom fetch function to wrap. Defaults to `globalThis.fetch`.
Array of payment methods to use.

nodes.docs: Account to sign transactions with. Can be overridden per-call via context.
